popularStory.headline: George (LEWES) Lewis History
popularStory.description:
GEORGE (LEWES) LEWIS, born 8/31/1600 Brenchley, Kent, England, and died in 1663 in Barnstable, Barnstable County, Massachusetts.   His will being exhibited in court the 3rd of March 1663. 
George Lewe …

zh.lifeSummary: 當George Lewis Jr.於1600年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親George Lewis29歲，母親Dennis Foreman21歲。他於1624年11月1日與Mary Doggett在英國肯特霍斯蒙登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1633年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼並於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼希圖阿潔。他去世於1663年3月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年63歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Lewis Jr.于1600年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲George Lewis29岁，母亲Dennis Foreman21岁。他于1624年11月1日与Mary Doggett在英国肯特霍斯蒙登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1633年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼并于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼希圖阿潔。他去世于1663年3月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波享年63岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When George Lewis Jr. was born in 1600, in Kent, England, his father, George Lewis, was 29 and his mother, Dennis Foreman, was 21. He married Mary Doggett on 1 November 1624, in Horsmonden, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1633 and lived in Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1639. He died on 3 March 1663, in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Lewis Jr. est né en 1600, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, George Lewis, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Dennis Foreman, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary Doggett le 1 novembre 1624, à Horsmonden, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1633 et a vécu à Scituate, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1663, à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Lewis Jr. 1600 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Lewis 29 und seine Mutter Dennis Foreman 21. Er hat am 1. November 1624 in Horsmonden, Kent, England Mary Doggett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er ist 1633 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. 1639 hat er in Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 3. März 1663 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Lewis Jr. è nato il nel 1600 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, George Lewis, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Dennis Foreman, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mary Doggett il 1 novembre 1624, nel Horsmonden, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1633 e vissuto a Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639. Morì il 3 marzo 1663, nel Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: George Lewis Jr.が1600年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父George Lewisは29歳，母Dennis Foremanは21歳であった。1624年11月1日にイギリスケントホールスモンデンでMary Doggettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住し，1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニースシトゥアトに住んでいた。彼は1663年3月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルで63歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일
ko.Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 스시투앳
ko.lifeSummary: George Lewis Jr.(이)가 1600년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Lewis(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Dennis Foreman(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1624년 11월 1일 영국 켄트 호르스몽에서 Mary Doggett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났고, 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 스시투앳에서 살았다. 그는 1663년 3월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Lewis Jr. nasceu em 1600, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Lewis, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Dennis Foreman, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Doggett em 1 de novembro de 1624, em Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1633 e viveu em Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1639. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1663, em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Lewis Jr. родился в 1600 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени George Lewis было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Dennis Foreman, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Doggett 1 ноября 1624 г. в местности хаурсмонден, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1633 году, а также жил в местности сситуэит, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году. Он умер 3 марта 1663 г. в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Lewis Jr. nació en 1600, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, George Lewis, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Dennis Foreman, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mary Doggett el 1 de noviembre de 1624, en Horsmonden, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1633 y vivió en Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1639. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1663, en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
